metadata.name: Service Provider Retainer Engagement
metadata.author: Agreements Protocol
metadata.description: Retainer engagement workflow with signatures, initial funding, recurring invoices, top-up requests, and a final invoice closeout flow

serviceProviderWalletAddress.name: Service Provider Wallet Address
serviceProviderWalletAddress.helperText: Wallet address of the service provider
serviceProviderWalletAddress.description: Participant address used when the service provider signs and submits invoices.

clientWalletAddress.name: Client Wallet Address
clientWalletAddress.description: Participant address used when the client signs and reviews the retainer workflow.

retainerTitle.name: Retainer Title
retainerTitle.description: Primary identifier used for this retainer

retainerDescription.name: Retainer Description
retainerDescription.description: Text that helps contextualize this agreement

serviceProviderName.name: Service Provider Name
serviceProviderName.helperText: Name of the service provider (e.g. Example Studio)
serviceProviderName.description: Brand name or individual name of the service provider to display on invoice and prose content.

clientName.name: Client Name
clientName.helperText: Name of the client (e.g. the customer)
clientName.description: Brand name or individual name of the client to display on invoice and prose content.

retainerCeiling.name: Retainer Ceiling
retainerCeiling.description: The maximum amount of value to be held in the retainer at any point in time. When a retainer topup is requested, it will fill to this amount.

retainerFloor.name: Retainer Floor
retainerFloor.helperText: Threshold at which retainer topup requested
retainerFloor.description: The minimum amount expected to be held in the retainer from month to month. If an invoice would reduce the retainer below this amount, topup of the retainer should be requested.

retainerAddress.name: Retainer Address
retainerAddress.helperText: Address of the account holding retainer funds
retainerAddress.description: CAIP-10 account identifier for the EOA, multisig, or other contract in which retainer funds are being held.

currencyAddress.name: Currency Address
currencyAddress.helperText: Token address used for retainer payments
currencyAddress.description: CAIP-19 asset identifier for the ERC-20 token used for payments and balance calculations on the retainer.

awaitingPaymentComment.name: Additional Comments
awaitingPaymentComment.helperText: Please provide any additional comments that might provide context.
awaitingPaymentComment.description: An opportunity to provide comments, feedback, or additional information.

awaitingPaymentTerminationReason.name: Reason for Termination
awaitingPaymentTerminationReason.helperText: Why is the agreement being terminated?
awaitingPaymentTerminationReason.description: Provide context as to why the agreement is being terminated.

submitInvoiceComment.name: Additional Comments
submitInvoiceComment.helperText: Please provide any additional comments that might provide context.
submitInvoiceComment.description: An opportunity to provide comments, feedback, or additional information.

topupInvoiceComment.name: Additional Comments
topupInvoiceComment.helperText: Please provide any additional comments that might provide context.
topupInvoiceComment.description: An opportunity to provide comments, feedback, or additional information.

workInProgressTerminationReason.name: Reason for Termination
workInProgressTerminationReason.helperText: Why is the agreement being terminated?
workInProgressTerminationReason.description: Provide context as to why the agreement is being terminated.

invoiceSubmittedComment.name: Additional Comments
invoiceSubmittedComment.helperText: Please provide any additional comments that might provide context.
invoiceSubmittedComment.description: An opportunity to provide comments, feedback, or additional information.

invoiceSubmittedFeedback.name: Feedback
invoiceSubmittedFeedback.helperText: Please provide any feedback about the invoice that may require edits or additional work.
invoiceSubmittedFeedback.description: An opportunity to provide comments, feedback, or request additional information.

invoiceSubmittedTerminationReason.name: Reason for Termination
invoiceSubmittedTerminationReason.helperText: Why is the agreement being terminated?
invoiceSubmittedTerminationReason.description: Provide context as to why the agreement is being terminated.

topupInvoiceFeedback.name: Feedback
topupInvoiceFeedback.helperText: Please provide any feedback about the invoice that may require edits or additional work.
topupInvoiceFeedback.description: An opportunity to provide comments, feedback, or request additional information.

topupInvoiceTerminationReason.name: Reason for Termination
topupInvoiceTerminationReason.helperText: Why is the agreement being terminated?
topupInvoiceTerminationReason.description: Provide context as to why the agreement is being terminated.

finalInvoiceComment.name: Additional Comments
finalInvoiceComment.helperText: Please provide any additional comments that might provide context.
finalInvoiceComment.description: An opportunity to provide comments, feedback, or additional information.

finalInvoiceFeedback.name: Dispute with Feedback
finalInvoiceFeedback.helperText: Please provide any feedback about the invoice that may require edits or additional work.
finalInvoiceFeedback.description: An opportunity to provide comments, feedback, or request additional information.

finalTerminationComment.name: Comment
finalTerminationComment.helperText: Please provide any additional comments that might provide context.
finalTerminationComment.description: An opportunity to provide comments, feedback, or additional information.

AWAITING_SERVICE_PROVIDER_SIGNATURE.name: Awaiting Service Provider Signature
AWAITING_SERVICE_PROVIDER_SIGNATURE.description: Waiting for the service provider to sign the retainer engagement

AWAITING_CLIENT_SIGNATURE.name: Awaiting Client Signature
AWAITING_CLIENT_SIGNATURE.description: Waiting for the client to countersign the retainer engagement

AWAITING_PAYMENT.name: Awaiting Payment
AWAITING_PAYMENT.description: Waiting for the client to top up the retainer wallet for the first time

WORK_IN_PROGRESS.name: Work in Progress
WORK_IN_PROGRESS.description: Service provider is performing work and monitoring the retainer balance

INVOICE_SUBMITTED.name: Invoice Submitted
INVOICE_SUBMITTED.description: Invoice was submitted and no retainer topup is currently required

INVOICE_SUBMITTED_WITH_TOPUP.name: Invoice Submitted with Topup
INVOICE_SUBMITTED_WITH_TOPUP.description: Invoice was submitted and a retainer topup is required

PENDING_FINAL_INVOICE.name: Pending Final Invoice
PENDING_FINAL_INVOICE.description: Termination has been initiated and the service provider must prepare the final invoice

FINAL_INVOICE_REVIEW.name: Final Invoice Review
FINAL_INVOICE_REVIEW.description: The client is reviewing the final invoice before the service provider settles and closes the retainer

initialize.name: Initialize Service Provider Retainer Engagement
initialize.description: Create the retainer workflow and initialize the participants and retainer settings

serviceProviderSign.description: Service provider signs the retainer engagement

serviceProviderSignature.name: Service Provider Signature
serviceProviderSignature.helperText: Sign to accept the retainer terms
serviceProviderSignature.description: Electronic signature of the service provider.

clientSignature.name: Client Signature
clientSignature.helperText: Sign to accept the retainer terms

submitInitialPaymentProof.description: Service provider or client supplies proof that the initial retainer payment was executed

awaitingPaymentPaymentLink.name: Link to Payment Proof
awaitingPaymentPaymentLink.description: Block explorer link for payment execution

awaitingPaymentInitiateTermination.description: Service provider or client initiates termination before work begins

submitInvoice.description: Service provider submits an invoice while the retainer remains above the floor

invoiceLineItems.name: Invoice Line Items
invoiceLineItems.helperText: Use our interactive tool to define individual line items
invoiceLineItems.description: Tabular data capturing the date, description, quantity, rate, and amount of each line item in the invoice.

submitInvoiceWithTopup.description: Service provider submits an invoice and indicates that a retainer topup is required

topupInvoiceLineItems.name: Invoice Line Items
topupInvoiceLineItems.helperText: Use our interactive tool to define individual line items
topupInvoiceLineItems.description: Tabular data capturing the date, description, quantity, rate, and amount of each line item in the invoice.

workInProgressInitiateTermination.description: Service provider or client initiates the final invoice flow while work is in progress

invoiceSubmittedApprove.description: Service provider or client approves the currently submitted invoice

invoiceSubmittedReject.description: Service provider or client sends feedback on the currently submitted invoice

invoiceSubmittedInitiateTermination.description: Service provider or client initiates the final invoice flow from invoice review

topupInvoiceApprove.description: Service provider or client supplies payment proof for the topup invoice

topupInvoicePaymentLink.name: Link to Payment Proof
topupInvoicePaymentLink.description: Block explorer link for payment execution

topupInvoiceReject.description: Service provider or client sends feedback on the topup invoice

topupInvoiceTermination.description: Service provider or client initiates the final invoice flow from the topup invoice state

finalInvoiceSubmit.description: Service provider submits the final invoice package for closeout

finalInvoiceLineItems.name: Invoice Line Items
finalInvoiceLineItems.helperText: Use our interactive tool to define individual line items
finalInvoiceLineItems.description: Tabular data capturing the date, description, quantity, rate, and amount of each line item in the invoice.

disputeFinalInvoice.description: Client disputes the final invoice and sends feedback

settleFinalInvoice.description: Service provider provides final payment proof and closes the retainer

finalInvoicePaymentProof.name: Link to Payment Proof
finalInvoicePaymentProof.description: Block explorer link for payment execution
